freshness_decay_note: Scores use configurable freshness decay so older classified items have less influence than newer classified items.

high_severity_items.summary: Fed's Goolsbee notes that energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, with oil prices still elevated despite recent decline on Iran peace deal news.

high_severity_items.summary: Oil prices plunge nearly 10% on expectations of a 60-day ceasefire extension and partial reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, reducing geopolitical risk and easing supply concerns.

high_severity_items.summary: Colombia's 2026 presidential election raises concerns for the oil industry due to incumbent Petro's anti-fossil fuel policies, which have caused an energy crisis. A potential new president could revive the sector.
